inputs: Design a problem where two agents must navigate a maze environment to reach a goal.
Create a scenario where three agents compete to collect the most rewards within a limited time frame.
Develop a problem where agents must collaborate to solve a puzzle by sharing observations and coordinating actions.
Design a simulation where agents have different action spaces and must adapt their strategies to outperform each other.
Create a scenario where agents must balance exploration and exploitation to maximize their cumulative rewards.
